text: Now let me fetch all open pull requests and compute both answers in one program:

tool_calls.name: execute_lisp
tool_calls.input:
{"code":"(def prs (github__list_pull_requests {:state "open"}))

(def total (count prs))

(def repo-counts (frequencies (map :repo prs)))

(def top-repo (apply max-key val repo-counts))

(str "Total open PRs: " total
     " | Most PRs: " (key top-repo) " with " (val top-repo) " PRs"
     " | All repos: " repo-counts)"}
